7.0 Relaxation in eligibility/duration of the course. As in some States the duration of the Pre-Primary (Early Childhood care and education) is -one year .and the eligibility for admission to such course is a pass in class ten, such States are given time up to the. end of academic session 2004-2005 to switch over their programmes for bringing them in conformity with the NCTE Norms and Standards.
